discrepancy_analysis: CONCORDANT: Reported result (33 cutaneous neurofibromas) exactly matches the model's result (33 samples classified as Cutaneous_NF). The Cutaneous_NF count is exactly 33 (0% relative difference), well within the +/-10% concordance threshold.
